targets.rawSql: SELECT region_name, _score FROM demo.german_regions WHERE MATCH($search_categories, '$keyword') ORDER By _score DESC limit 100;
SELECT $search_categories FROM demo.german_regions WHERE  region_name = '$region' ORDER By _score DESC limit 1;
SELECT MAX(d2.measurement_time) last_time FROM demo.climate_data d2 WHERE $__timeFilter("measurement_time")

SELECT
  measurement_time as time,
  min(data['temperature'] -273.15) as temperature_min,
  max(data['temperature'] -273.15) as temperature_max
FROM
  demo.climate_data d
      ,  "demo"."german_regions" r
WHERE WITHIN(d.geo_location, r.geo_coords)
AND (r.region_name = '${region}' OR 'ALL' =  '${region}')
AND d.measurement_time = (SELECT MAX(d2.measurement_time) FROM demo.climate_data d2 WHERE $__timeFilter("measurement_time"))
GROUP BY measurement_time;

SELECT
  measurement_time as time,
  min(data['pressure'] / 100) as pressure_min,
  max(data['pressure'] / 100) as pressure_max
FROM
  demo.climate_data d
      ,  "demo"."german_regions" r
WHERE WITHIN(d.geo_location, r.geo_coords)
AND (r.region_name = '${region}' OR 'ALL' =  '${region}')
AND d.measurement_time = (SELECT MAX(d2.measurement_time) FROM demo.climate_data d2 WHERE $__timeFilter("measurement_time"))
GROUP BY measurement_time;

SELECT
  measurement_time as time,
  min(sqrt(data['u10']*data['u10'] + data['v10']*data['v10'])) as wind_min,
  max(sqrt(data['u10']*data['u10'] + data['v10']*data['v10'])) as wind_max
FROM
  demo.climate_data d
      ,  "demo"."german_regions" r
WHERE WITHIN(d.geo_location, r.geo_coords)
AND (r.region_name = '${region}' OR 'ALL' =  '${region}')
AND  d.measurement_time = (SELECT MAX(d2.measurement_time) FROM demo.climate_data d2 WHERE $__timeFilter("measurement_time"))
GROUP BY measurement_time;

panels.title: Temperature, Pressure and Windspeed at end of measurement period

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  measurement_time as time,
  latitude(d.geo_location) as latitude,
  longitude(d.geo_location) as longitude,
  latitude(d.geo_location) as latitude_raw,
  longitude(d.geo_location) as longitude_raw,
  data['temperature'] -273.15 as temperature,
  gp.nearest_town
FROM
  demo.climate_data d
      ,  "demo"."german_regions" r
      , demo.geo_points gp
WHERE WITHIN(d.geo_location, r.geo_coords)
AND gp.geo_location = d.geo_location
AND (r.region_name = '${region}' OR 'ALL' =  '${region}')
AND  d.measurement_time = (SELECT d2.measurement_time FROM demo.climate_data d2 WHERE $__timeFilter("measurement_time") ORDER BY measurement_time DESC LIMIT 1);

SELECT
  measurement_time as time,
  latitude(d.geo_location) as latitude,
  longitude(d.geo_location) as longitude,
  latitude(d.geo_location) as latitude_raw,
  longitude(d.geo_location) as longitude_raw,
  data['pressure'] / 100 as pressure,
  gp.nearest_town
FROM
  demo.climate_data  d
      ,  "demo"."german_regions" r 
      , demo.geo_points gp
WHERE WITHIN(d.geo_location, r.geo_coords)
AND (r.region_name = '${region}' OR 'ALL' =  '${region}')
AND gp.geo_location = d.geo_location
AND  d.measurement_time = (SELECT MAX(d2.measurement_time) FROM demo.climate_data d2 WHERE $__timeFilter("measurement_time"));

SELECT
  measurement_time as time,
  latitude(d.geo_location) as latitude,
  longitude(d.geo_location) as longitude,
  latitude(d.geo_location) as latitude_raw,
  longitude(d.geo_location) as longitude_raw,
  data['temperature'] -273.15 as temperature,
  data['pressure'] /  100 as pressure,
  MOD(
        ATAN2(-data['u10'], -data['v10']) * 180.0 / PI() + 360,
        360
    ) AS wind_direction_deg,
      sqrt(data['u10']*data['u10'] + data['v10']*data['v10']) AS wind_speed,
  gp.nearest_town
FROM
  demo.climate_data d
      ,  "demo"."german_regions" r
       , demo.geo_points gp
WHERE WITHIN(d.geo_location, r.geo_coords)
AND (r.region_name = '${region}' OR 'ALL' =  '${region}')
AND gp.geo_location = d.geo_location
AND  d.measurement_time = (SELECT MAX(d2.measurement_time) FROM demo.climate_data d2 WHERE $__timeFilter("measurement_time"));

SELECT
  measurement_time as time,
  avg(data['temperature']) -273.15 as temperature_avg,
  min(data['temperature']) -273.15 as temperature_min,
  max(data['temperature']) -273.15 as temperature_max
FROM
  demo.climate_data d
      ,  "demo"."german_regions" r
WHERE WITHIN(d.geo_location, r.geo_coords)
AND (r.region_name = '${region}' OR 'ALL' =  '${region}')
AND $__timeFilter("measurement_time")
GROUP BY measurement_time
ORDER BY measurement_time;

panels.title: Min, Average and Max temperature for $region

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  measurement_time as time,
  avg(data['pressure']) / 100 as pressure_avg,
  min(data['pressure']) / 100 as pressure_min,
  max(data['pressure']) / 100  as pressure_max
FROM
  demo.climate_data d
      ,  "demo"."german_regions" r
WHERE WITHIN(d.geo_location, r.geo_coords)
AND (r.region_name = '${region}' OR 'ALL' =  '${region}')
AND $__timeFilter("measurement_time")
AND data['pressure'] IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY measurement_time
ORDER BY measurement_time;

panels.title: Min, Average and Max air pressure for $region

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  measurement_time as time,
  avg(sqrt(data['u10']*data['u10'] + data['v10']*data['v10'])) AS wind_speed_avg,
  min(sqrt(data['u10']*data['u10'] + data['v10']*data['v10'])) AS wind_speed_min,
  max(sqrt(data['u10']*data['u10'] + data['v10']*data['v10'])) AS wind_speed_max
FROM
  demo.climate_data d
      ,  "demo"."german_regions" r
WHERE WITHIN(d.geo_location, r.geo_coords)
AND (r.region_name = '${region}' OR 'ALL' =  '${region}')
AND $__timeFilter("measurement_time")
AND data['pressure'] IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY measurement_time
ORDER BY measurement_time;

panels.title: Min, Average and Max wind speed for $region

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  measurement_time as time,
  avg(data['temperature']) -273.15 as temperature_avg
  ,gp.nearest_town
FROM
  demo.climate_data d
, demo.geo_points gp
WHERE  latitude(d.geo_location) = $latitude
AND longitude(d.geo_location)=  $longitude
AND gp.geo_location = d.geo_location
AND  $__timeFilter("measurement_time")
GROUP BY measurement_time,gp.nearest_town;

SELECT
  measurement_time as time,
  avg(data['pressure']) / 100 as pressure_avg,
  gp.nearest_town
FROM
  demo.climate_data d
  , demo.geo_points gp
WHERE $__timeFilter("measurement_time")
AND latitude(d.geo_location) = $latitude
AND longitude(d.geo_location)=  $longitude
AND gp.geo_location = d.geo_location
GROUP BY measurement_time,gp.nearest_town;

SELECT
  measurement_time as time,
  avg(sqrt(data['u10']*data['u10'] + data['v10']*data['v10'])) AS wind_speed_avg
FROM
  demo.climate_data d,
  demo.geo_points gp
WHERE $__timeFilter("measurement_time")
AND latitude(d.geo_location) = $latitude 
AND longitude(d.geo_location)=  $longitude
AND gp.geo_location = d.geo_location
GROUP BY measurement_time,gp.nearest_town;
